message:
feat(search): expand searchPromptsByText to include id and content

The simple text search was only checking title, description, and tags.
Users searching for specific prompt IDs or content keywords weren't
finding matches.

Changes:
- Add prompt id to searchable fields
- Add prompt content to searchable fields
- Concatenate all fields into single searchable string
- Add early return for empty queries
- Add JSDoc documentation

This makes the simple search more comprehensive while the BM25
index handles ranked relevance for the main search experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
